Paper_Metadata.Paper_Title: Tailoring thickness debit for high-temperature fatigue resistance of Inconel 718 superalloy fabricated by laser powder bed fusion

Composition_Info.Note: Standard Inconel 718 nominal composition per AMS 5664; actual composition referenced from previous work (Ma et al., 2022)

Process_Info.Process_Category: Laser Powder Bed Fusion (LPBF) + Heat Treatment

Process_Text.original: LPBF fabrication using EOSINT M270D (Yb fiber laser, 285 W, 960 mm/s, 0.100 mm hatch spacing, 0.040 mm layer thickness, 67 deg rotation) -> stress relief at 600 degC for 2 h furnace cool -> homogenization at 1065 degC for 1 h -> two-step aging: 760 degC for 10 h with furnace cooling to 650 degC at 55 degC/h + 650 degC for 8 h with air cooling to RT
Process_Text.simplified: LPBF + stress relief 600 degC/2h + homogenization 1065 degC/1h + two-step aging (760 degC/10h + 650 degC/8h)

Microstructure_Text.original: HA1065 specimen consists of epitaxial columnar and V-shaped grains; grain orientation includes <001>//BD (Schmid factors 0.41-0.5) and <101>//BD (Schmid factors 0.25-0.5); elongated Laves phases along dendritic boundaries and irregular particle-like Laves phases at grain boundaries; rod-like or needle-like delta phases at grain boundaries; precipitates at grain boundaries much more than HA1100; higher aspect ratio of precipitates than HA1100; gamma' and gamma'' phases present with gamma''/gamma' volume ratio ~3-4
Microstructure_Text.simplified: Columnar and V-shaped grains with strong texture; Laves and delta phases at grain boundaries; gamma''/gamma' strengthening phases

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at 650 degC; strain rate 5e-3 s^-1; loading direction along BD
Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: Gauge 6 mm x 1.5 mm x 1.1 mm ground and electropolished to 0.75 mm thickness
Properties_Info.Note: Mean of 3 tests; specimen gauge section 0.75 mm thick

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at 650 degC; strain rate 5e-3 s^-1; loading direction along BD
Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: Gauge 6 mm x 1.5 mm x 1.1 mm ground and electropolished to 0.75 mm thickness
Properties_Info.Note: Mean of 3 tests

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at 650 degC; strain rate 5e-3 s^-1; loading direction along BD
Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: Gauge 6 mm x 1.5 mm x 1.1 mm ground and electropolished to 0.75 mm thickness
Properties_Info.Note: Fracture elongation; mean of 3 tests

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at 650 degC; transition from scale-independent fatigue life region (SIR) to size-affected fatigue life region (SAR)
Properties_Info.Note: Criterion: t/d > 8.8 required to ensure stable fatigue life at 650 degC for HA1065 condition

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at 650 degC; stress amplitude 405 MPa; stress ratio R=0.1; frequency 1 Hz; max stress 900 MPa (85% of lower yield strength)
Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: Electropolished thin-walled specimen, thickness t=0.25 mm, tolerance +/-0.05 mm
Properties_Info.Note: t/d ratio = 4.3 (grain size d=58.5 um); specimen surface roughness Sa=0.121 um; crack initiation from surface

Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: Electropolished thin-walled specimen, thickness t=0.50 mm, tolerance +/-0.05 mm
Properties_Info.Note: t/d ratio = 8.5; specimen surface roughness Sa=0.121 um

Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: Electropolished thin-walled specimen, thickness t=0.75 mm, tolerance +/-0.05 mm
Properties_Info.Note: t/d ratio = 12.8; specimen surface roughness Sa=0.121 um

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at 650 degC; stress amplitude 405 MPa; stress ratio R=0.1; frequency 1 Hz; max stress 900 MPa
Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: Electropolished thin-walled specimen, thickness t=1.00 mm, tolerance +/-0.05 mm
Properties_Info.Note: t/d ratio = 17.1; specimen surface roughness Sa=0.121 um

Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: Electropolished thin-walled specimen, thickness t=2.00 mm, tolerance +/-0.05 mm
Properties_Info.Note: t/d ratio = 34.2; specimen surface roughness Sa=0.121 um

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: Fatigue test at 650 degC; R=0.1
Properties_Info.Note: 85% of yield strength 1067.6 MPa; below yield to minimize initial plastic deformation

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: Fatigue test at 650 degC; stress ratio R=0.1; frequency 1 Hz
Properties_Info.Note: 85% of lower yield strength (1067.6 MPa)

Composition_Info.Note: Standard Inconel 718 nominal composition per AMS 5664; actual composition referenced from previous work (Ma et al., 2022)

Process_Info.Process_Category: Laser Powder Bed Fusion (LPBF) + Heat Treatment

Process_Text.original: LPBF fabrication using EOSINT M270D (Yb fiber laser, 285 W, 960 mm/s, 0.100 mm hatch spacing, 0.040 mm layer thickness, 67 deg rotation) -> stress relief at 600 degC for 2 h furnace cool -> homogenization at 1100 degC for 1 h (recrystallization onset temperature) -> two-step aging: 760 degC for 10 h with furnace cooling to 650 degC at 55 degC/h + 650 degC for 8 h with air cooling to RT
Process_Text.simplified: LPBF + stress relief 600 degC/2h + homogenization 1100 degC/1h (higher temp) + two-step aging (760 degC/10h + 650 degC/8h)

Microstructure_Text.original: HA1100 specimen has relatively equiaxed grains due to recrystallization and grain growth at 1100 degC; many annealing twins present; particle-like carbides at grain boundaries; Laves and delta phases dissolved; gamma'' phase volume fraction higher than HA1065; random grain orientation distribution; lower stress concentration factor Kt than HA1065
Microstructure_Text.simplified: Equiaxed grains with annealing twins; dissolved Laves/delta phases; random orientation; higher gamma'' volume fraction than HA1065

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at 650 degC; strain rate 5e-3 s^-1; loading direction along BD
Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: Gauge 6 mm x 1.5 mm x 1.1 mm ground and electropolished to 0.75 mm thickness
Properties_Info.Note: Mean of 3 tests; higher than HA1065 (1067.6 MPa)

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at 650 degC; strain rate 5e-3 s^-1; loading direction along BD
Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: Gauge 6 mm x 1.5 mm x 1.1 mm ground and electropolished to 0.75 mm thickness
Properties_Info.Note: Mean of 3 tests; similar to HA1065 (1215.7 MPa)

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at 650 degC; strain rate 5e-3 s^-1; loading direction along BD
Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: Gauge 6 mm x 1.5 mm x 1.1 mm ground and electropolished to 0.75 mm thickness
Properties_Info.Note: Fracture elongation; mean of 3 tests; lower than HA1065 (9.1%)

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at 650 degC; transition from scale-independent fatigue life region (SIR) to size-affected fatigue life region (SAR)
Properties_Info.Note: Criterion: t/d > 6.2 required to ensure stable fatigue life at 650 degC for HA1100 condition; lower than HA1065 (8.8), allowing thinner components

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at 650 degC; stress amplitude 405 MPa; stress ratio R=0.1; frequency 1 Hz; max stress 900 MPa
Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: Electropolished thin-walled specimen, thickness t=0.25 mm, tolerance +/-0.05 mm
Properties_Info.Note: t/d ratio = 4.6 (grain size d=54.1 um); specimen surface roughness Sa=0.121 um; longer fatigue life than HA1065 at same thickness

Properties_Info.Note: t/d ratio = 13.9; specimen surface roughness Sa=0.121 um

Properties_Info.Note: t/d ratio = 18.5; specimen surface roughness Sa=0.121 um

Properties_Info.Note: 81% of yield strength 1109.8 MPa; below yield to minimize initial plastic deformation; same as HA1065 for comparison
